warning: PLACEHOLDER, NOT CALIBRATED. These (layer, head) entries are structurally valid (within Qwen2.5-1.5B's 28 layers x 12 attention heads) so the head loader and observer wiring can be exercised, but they were NOT discovered from word-aligned parallel text. Running the qwen_vllm_alignatt reference with these heads will produce meaningless cut decisions.
